title: SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 2C Project
tagline: Build a mini application using SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 2C
description: Create a working SQL & Databases application demonstrating SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 2C.
starterCode:
-- SQL Database query for SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 2C
SELECT id, title, category, created_at
FROM application_records
WHERE category = 'SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 2C' AND is_active = 1
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
solution:
-- SQL Database query for SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 2C
